faqs.question: How do I reset my password?
faqs.answer: Click Forgot Password on login page or go to Settings > Security > Reset Password.

faqs.question: My account is locked, how do I unlock it?
faqs.answer: Wait 30 minutes after 5 failed attempts, or contact your admin to unlock.

faqs.question: How do I delete my account?
faqs.answer: Settings > Account > Delete Account. 7-day grace period before permanent deletion.
